.exit
await contract.checkAccess(0, "0x9f56C07dDb32Ada3Fc87e5d4668D4C9f42559119")
await contract.revokeAccess(0, "0x9f56C07dDb32Ada3Fc87e5d4668D4C9f42559119")
await contract.checkAccess(0, "0x9f56C07dDb32Ada3Fc87e5d4668D4C9f42559119")
await contract.grantAccess(0, "0x9f56C07dDb32Ada3Fc87e5d4668D4C9f42559119", expiry)
const expiry = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + 3600
await contract.grantAccess(0, "PASTE_PROVIDER_ADDRESS", expiry)
const expiry = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + 3600
await contract.documents(0)
await contract.addDocument("0x9f56C07dDb32Ada3Fc87e5d4668D4C9f42559119", "QmTestCID")
